data.content: Pushed 15b0a1b3 to origin/main. Dispatch now exposes one Swap Agent control at the Dispatch level, removes swap-specific instructional copy from per-step pool editors, and keeps regression coverage on that single global placement. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only, pre-existing); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
